creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
I was building gitlab-ce on Poudriere. I believe the package without the choice of Kerberos is security/rubygem-timfel-krb5 (rubygem-timfel-krb5-auth) as it tries to install krb5 as a dependency.

===>   gitlab-ce-11.8.1 depends on package: rubygem-omniauth-google-oauth2>=0.6.0 - found
===>   Returning to build of gitlab-ce-11.8.1
===>   gitlab-ce-11.8.1 depends on package: rubygem-omniauth-kerberos>=0.3.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/rubygem-omniauth-kerberos-0.3.0.txz
 Installing rubygem-omniauth-kerberos-0.3.0...
 `-- Installing rubygem-omniauth-multipassword-0.4.2...
 `-- Extracting rubygem-omniauth-multipassword-0.4.2: .......... done
 `-- Installing rubygem-timfel-krb5-auth-0.8.3...
 |   `-- Installing krb5-1.17_1...
